findings.message: weapon_type is a pseudo keyword and cannot be used as a standalone command
weapon_type is a pseudo keyword and cannot be used as a standalone command

script_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

weapon artillery_shell WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
end_weapon

weapon cruise_missile WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
end_weapon

platform_type COMMANDER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   processor coordinator WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR

      script void SetTask(WsfPlatform aPlatform, WsfTrack aTrack)
         string weaponName = aPlatform.WeaponEntry(0).Name();
         WsfWeaponTask task = WsfWeaponTask.Create("TIME_ON_TARGET", weaponName);
         task.SetQuantity(1);
         task.SetCommDevice("perfect");
         task.SetAssignee(aPlatform.Name());
         AssignTask(aTrack, task);
      end_script

      execute at_time 1.0 sec absolute
         WsfPlatform target = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("red_target");
         WsfTrack targetTrack = target.MakeTrack();
         targetTrack.SetAuxData("IMPACT_TIME", 120.0);
         PLATFORM.SetCurrentTarget(targetTrack);
         WsfPlatform arty = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("blue_artillery_battery");
         if (arty.IsValid())
            SetTask(arty, targetTrack);
         endif
         WsfPlatform missile = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("blue_missile_launcher");
         if (missile.IsValid())
            SetTask(missile, targetTrack);
         endif
      end_execute

      script void on_task_complete(WsfTask aTask)
         writeln("Task ", aTask.TaskId(), " assigned to ", aTask.Assignee(), " complete.");
      end_script

   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type ARTILLERY_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   weapon artillery_launcher WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
      weapon_type artillery_shell
      quantity 10
   end_weapon
   processor artillery_task WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
      script_variables
         WsfLaunchComputer mLC;
      end_script_variables

      on_initialize
         mLC = PLATFORM.WeaponEntry(0).LaunchComputer();
      end_on_initialize

      script void on_task_assigned(WsfTask task)
         if (mLC.IsValid())
            mLC.Launch(task);
         endif
      end_script
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type MISSILE_LAUNCHER_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   weapon missile_launcher WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
      weapon_type cruise_missile
      quantity 5
   end_weapon
   processor missile_task WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
      script_variables
         WsfLaunchComputer mLC;
      end_script_variables

      on_initialize
         mLC = PLATFORM.WeaponEntry(0).LaunchComputer();
      end_on_initialize

      script void on_task_assigned(WsfTask task)
         if (mLC.IsValid())
            mLC.Launch(task);
         endif
      end_script
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type TARGET_TYPE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform command_post COMMANDER_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.50N 104.00E altitude 500 m speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

platform blue_artillery_battery ARTILLERY_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.60N 104.00E altitude 500 m speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   comm perfect WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
   end_comm
end_platform

platform blue_missile_launcher MISSILE_LAUNCHER_TYPE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.65N 104.02E altitude 500 m speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
   comm perfect WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
   end_comm
end_platform

platform red_target TARGET_TYPE
   side red
   route
      position 30.80N 104.20E altitude 600 m speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/fires_time_on_target_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 600 sec
